title: Support reading and writing barriers with digital tools
staff_situations: How do I support reading and writing barriers?
underlying_needs: Digital access to text through assistive technology
Reduced cognitive load when reading or writing

accessibility: Text-to-speech and line focus support reading
Dictation reduces the barrier to producing written work
Captions support learners processing spoken content
inclusive_practice: Available to every learner, not only those who disclose a difficulty
Reduces the need for a learner to be singled out for support
trauma_informed: Avoids public exposure of a reading or writing difficulty
